task_description: Implement Priority 1 CRITICAL accessibility improvements for Job Dashboard page

accessibility_fixes.name: Fix touch target sizes
accessibility_fixes.description: All action buttons are w-8 h-8 (32px), need min 44×44px
accessibility_fixes.fix: Add min-h-[44px] and proper padding to all action buttons

accessibility_fixes.name: Add aria-labels to interactive elements
accessibility_fixes.description: Search input, filter buttons, action buttons, and table need aria-labels
accessibility_fixes.fix: Add descriptive aria-labels with context where appropriate

accessibility_fixes.name: Add skip link for keyboard users
accessibility_fixes.fix: Add <a href='#main-content' className='sr-only focus:not-sr-only'> at component top

accessibility_fixes.name: Fix Status dropdown keyboard navigation
accessibility_fixes.description: Ensure proper keyboard nav and focus management
accessibility_fixes.fix: Add proper focus trapping when dropdown is open

accessibility_fixes.name: Add focus trap to modal
accessibility_fixes.fix: Trap focus when modal opens, return to trigger on close

accessibility_fixes.name: Add aria-live region for toast notifications
accessibility_fixes.fix: Wrap toast in aria-live region for screen reader announcements

completed_work.description: Completed UI/UX review of DashboardPage.tsx (2031 lines)

decisions.decision: Focus on Priority 1 (CRITICAL) accessibility fixes only
decisions.rationale: Context was at 93%, need to address most critical accessibility issues first

next_action: Run /gsd:resume-work to continue with quick task 260327-wks
context_notes: Quick task was initialized but not executed due to context exhaustion (93% usage). The task is well-defined with clear scope. All 7 accessibility fixes are documented and ready for implementation.
